use anyhow::{Context, Result};
use std::fs;
use std::path::Path;

pub fn load_config(path: &Path) -> Result<Config> {
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)
        .with_context(|| format!("reading config from {}", path.display()))?;
    let config: Config = toml::from_str(&contents)
        .with_context(|| format!("parsing config from {}", path.display()))?;
    Ok(config)
}

pub fn save_output(path: &Path, data: &[u8]) -> Result<()> {
    if let Some(parent) = path.parent() {
        fs::create_dir_all(parent)
            .with_context(|| format!("creating directory {}", parent.display()))?;
    }
    fs::write(path, data)
        .with_context(|| format!("writing output to {}", path.display()))?;
    Ok(())
}

pub fn read_env_defaults() -> Result<EnvDefaults> {
    let host = std::env::var("APP_HOST")
        .context("missing APP_HOST environment variable")?;
    let port_str = std::env::var("APP_PORT")
        .context("missing APP_PORT environment variable")?;
    let port: u16 = port_str
        .parse()
        .with_context(|| format!("invalid APP_PORT value: {port_str}"))?;
    Ok(EnvDefaults { host, port })
}

struct Config {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
}

struct EnvDefaults {
    host: String,
    port: u16,
}
